title: More turmoil in Alberta Health Services as latest president and CEO departs
author: Jennifer Lee
notes: Source for EVT-072. Jennifer Lee (CBC Calgary health reporter) reports Athana Mentzelopoulos out as AHS president and CEO after just over a year. Province declines to confirm if she was fired. Andre Tremblay named interim. Frequent leadership changes described as costly for Alberta. Author confirmed from byline.
verification_notes: Verified 2026-06-18. Author Jennifer Lee (confirmed/added per operator).
